name: Datamosh
description: True video compression datamoshing with I/P-frame simulation, motion vector prediction, and authentic macroblock smearing artifacts.

params.name: Motion Strength
params.description: Strength of motion vector displacement (creates smearing trails)

params.name: Smear Blend
params.description: How much displaced pixels blend with current frame

params.name: Trail Decay
params.description: How long motion trails persist (higher=longer trails)
